mapper.sql: SELECT r.*, u.display_name FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN users u ON u.line_user_id = r.line_user_id
mapper.select: WHERE r.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY r.table_id, r.created_at
WHERE r.table_id = #{tableId} AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY r.created_at

SELECT r.*, u.display_name, s.session_date, s.start_time, t.table_number FROM reservations r JOIN sessions s ON s.id = r.session_id JOIN mahjong_tables t ON t.id = r.table_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.line_user_id = r.line_user_id WHERE r.line_user_id = #{lineUserId} AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND s.status = 'OPEN' AND (s.session_date > CURRENT_DATE OR (s.session_date = CURRENT_DATE AND s.start_time > CURRENT_TIME)) ORDER BY s.session_date, s.start_time

SELECT r.*, u.display_name, s.session_date, s.start_time, t.table_number FROM reservations r JOIN sessions s ON s.id = r.session_id JOIN mahjong_tables t ON t.id = r.table_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.line_user_id = r.line_user_id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (session_id, table_id, line_user_id, guest_count) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{tableId}, #{lineUserId}, #{guestCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_by = #{cancelledBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_by = #{cancelledBy}, cancel_note = #{cancelNote}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET table_id = #{tableId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET table_id = #{tableId}, guest_count = #{guestCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CONFIRMED', table_id = #{tableId}, guest_count = #{guestCount}, cancelled_by = NULL, cancel_note = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_by = #{cancelledBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED'
